steps.title: Identify what the goal requires
steps.content: The goal explicitly asks for the cup's name in Choctaw. The notes provide this: isht ishko. The correct choice must include this specific term to fulfill the goal.

steps.title: Match the choice to the goal
steps.content: Choice B provides the cup's Choctaw name (isht ishko). A, C, and D either mention the cup without naming it or skip it entirely. That matches choice B — B is correct.
